specific_change.target: Downsize primary RDS instance from db.r6g.xlarge to db.r6g.large and enable storage auto-scaling.
specific_change.produced: Downsize the primary RDS instance from db.r6g.xlarge (4 vCPU, 32 GiB RAM) to db.r6g.large (2 vCPU, 16 GiB RAM) and enable storage auto-scaling on the 200 GB volume. This halves the database compute co
